summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FairFare ride comparison app. All core features working correctly including input functionality, GPS detection, ride comparison, results display, deep linking, Weekend Ride save/load, and mobile-first responsive design. Backend API fully functional with proper distance calculations and mock ride estimates.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Compare rides with coordinates - proper Uber/Lyft estimates returned
Compare rides without coordinates - uses default coordinates correctly
Invalid data handling - returns proper 422 validation error
Status check creation and retrieval working
Frontend app loading with correct title and subtitle
Pickup and destination input functionality
GPS location detection button (clickable, expected geolocation error in headless)
Compare rides button triggers API call successfully
Results view displays Uber and Lyft cards with prices and wait times
Distance calculation displayed correctly (8.35 miles)
Deep link buttons present for both Uber and Lyft
Back button navigation working
Weekend Ride save functionality with localStorage
Weekend Ride load functionality restoring saved route
Mobile-first responsive design (390px viewport)
iOS-style design compliance with proper colors and spacing
PWA manifest.json accessible and properly configured
Manifest link present in HTML head
Service Worker support available
